descriptionEn:
вңЁ Spacious Villa with Sea & Mountain Views вҖ“ Glarokavos, above Xenia Beach

Welcome to this elegant and comfortable holiday home in Glarokavos, perched above Xenia Beach in the beautiful peninsula of Kassandra, Halkidiki вҖ” an excellent choice for peaceful seaside holidays for families, friends, or groups of up to 6 guests.

рҹ“Қ Location

рҹ“Қ Situated in the charming village of Glarokavos, just a few minutes from Xenia Beach вҖ” one of KassandraвҖҷs stunning coastal spots with crystal-clear waters.

The location offers the perfect blend of:

рҹҢҙ Scenic garden and panoramic views

рҹ‘ү This property delivers modern comfort, breathtaking views, and everything you need for a memorable holiday in Halkidiki вҖ” from sun-soaked beach days to cozy evenings under the stars.

рҹҢ… Despre locaИӣie
